bot0:arena:kv:policy.reasoning: Grapple is failing catastrophically against swords, shields, and daggers — 0 wins in last 9 rounds. Current aggression (0.6) and low threat aversion (40) are forcing suicidal engagements. Lower aggression to 0.3 and raise threat aversion to 60 to avoid high-risk targets. Increase grappleCloseMinGap

lessons: Grapple has 0 wins in last 9 rounds and 1 win in 19 total plays — abandon it entirely unless under pickup_surge (which has no data support).
Sword users (Warden, Executioner, Shredder, Reaper) caused 8 of last 10 deaths — engage only with sword or spear from cover, never with grapple.
Shield users (Juggernaut, Fortress) killed us 5 of last 6 rounds — grapple cannot penetrate shields; switch to spear or sword for direct damage.
Bow users (Deadeye, Andrew-Test, GhostProtocol) have 50+ kills vs us historically — avoid open ground; only engage from tight corridors or elevated positions.
Teleport_surge rounds saw 90%+ enemy use of spear and daggers — avoid this modifier unless armed with spear or sword.
Shredder and Reaper have killed us 3+ times each in last 5 rounds — both use sword/staff and exploit grapple’s range; retreat or flank aggressively on sight.
bot0:arena:kv:insights.recommendedWeaponReason: Sword is the only weapon that has successfully killed multiple high-threat opponents (Warden, Reaper, Shredder) in recent rounds and counters the dominant enemy loadout.

bot1:arena:kv:policy.reasoning: Staff is dying to bow and grapple users despite high dodge usage — lowering dodgeEagerness to 0.6 conserves dodges for true emergencies. Increasing grappleCloseMinGap to 3.0 creates more buffer against fast closes. Raising targetThreatAversion to 110 reduces risky engagements against high-threat ran

bot2:arena:kv:policy.reasoning: Dying to grapple users despite high kiteRangeBias — increase to 3.5 for better escape buffer. Raise targetThreatAversion to 15 to prioritize avoiding grapple users, especially in teleport_surge rounds. Keep retreatFireWhileKiting enabled to deter chasers. Increase pathfindDangerWeight to 0.6 for saf

lessons: Staff wins only when sword sightings exceed 50 (rounds 17, 20) — avoid using it when sword sightings are <20 (rounds 13–16, 19), as we die to bows and grapples with no counter.
Deadeye (bow) killed us in round 15 and Scorpion (grapple) in rounds 11 and 16 — avoid open terrain; bows outrange staff and grapples close faster than we can react.
Sword users (GhostProtocol, Hook, Lancer, Valkyrie, Warden) are our top targets — we killed 8 with 0 deaths in rounds 17 and 20 when sword sightings were high (>30); prioritize them aggressively when
Reaper (staff) killed us in round 19 — avoid 1v1 duels against other staff users; they match our range and outmaneuver us in close quarters due to superior mobility or timing.
Teleport_surge rounds (14, 19) correlate with 0 kills and high deaths — adopt defensive posture during teleport_surge; we lost both rounds with no kills and low survival.
Shield sightings spiked in round 20 (297) — avoid engaging shield users head-on; they negate our staff range and force us into unfavorable melee.
bot1:arena:kv:insights.recommendedWeaponReason: Sword has the highest kill efficiency against dominant enemy weapons (swords) and enabled 8 kills with 0 deaths in our two winning rounds (17 and 20), while staff fails without high sword presence.

lessons: Bow users (Deadeye, Ranger) killed you 3 times in last 5 rounds — never hold open sightlines; retreat behind cover or use teleport_surge chaos to reposition.
Grapple users (Scorpion, Hook) killed you 4 times in last 5 rounds — especially lethal during teleport_surge; avoid predictable spawn zones and never linger near walls.
Sword users are your #1 kill target — you killed 22 in last 10 rounds (7 in one round); prioritize them aggressively when grapple/staff are not in direct line of sight.
Shield and spear weapons are dominant in recent rounds (375+ sightings) — avoid close-quarters fights; use range and mobility to kite, never engage head-on.
You survived 3200 ticks in teleport_surge rounds — use the chaos to flank, not to camp; holding position = instant death from grapple or bow.
You have 0 kills in 3 of last 5 rounds — your bow is ineffective when outnumbered by grapple/staff; switch weapon when 2+ high-threat enemies are spotted.
bot2:arena:kv:insights.recommendedWeaponReason: Staff has highest KD in history_summary (15 kills / 12 deaths in teleport_surge) and counters bow users at range, while you're being out-ranged by Archmage and Reaper.
